steps.title: Identify the sentence's job
steps.content: The underlined sentence says what data the team used, the time span covered, and what comparison they made: forecasts versus actual earnings.

steps.title: Reject results and examples
steps.content:
• Choice A: The results appear in the following sentence, not in the underlined one.
  • Choice B: The sentence gives no specific company or forecast example.
  • Choice D: It does not describe a challenge the team faced.

steps.title: Name the methodology role
steps.content: Because it explains the study's data and comparison procedure, the underlined sentence describes part of the team's methodology. The answer is C.
